query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_codes, COUNT(CASE WHEN branches != '[]' THEN 1 END) as codes_with_branches, SUM(JSON_LENGTH(branches)) as total_branches FROM codes;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Lfvuvpa4KoYTbU.root --database a2JMvfTkjxD7rpSD5GgnMY --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total_codes, COUNT(CASE WHEN branches != '[]' THEN 1 END) as codes_with_branches, SUM(JSON_LENGTH(branches)) as total_branches FROM codes;
